title: Generate a 3D Model of a Product for E-commerce Use
scenario: Create a 3D model of a product that showcases its design and features. The model should be interactive, allowing users to rotate and zoom in on specific parts. Include a legend to explain the different materials and their corresponding colors. The model should be optimized for web use and meet the specified file size constraint.
constraints: Must have a maximum file size of 1.5MB

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the 3D model adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the 3D model easy to understand and navigate?
Does the 3D model allow users to interact with it and view specific parts?
Does the 3D model meet the specified file size constraint?
